role_in_eval: BASELINE — shows what PyMuPDF provides with zero post-processing, and what our own font-size inference can recover. pymupdf4llm (03) is built on top of this exact engine.
what_raw_gives_you: Font name, size, bold/italic flags per span
what_raw_does_not_give_you: Markdown headings (must infer from font sizes yourself)
Markdown tables (must detect from bounding boxes yourself)
OCR for scanned PDFs (must add Tesseract separately)
Multi-column ordering (sort=True helps but is not perfect)
Bold/italic Markdown syntax (must map flags yourself)
